headline: Bank of Japan keeps rates steady as expected, warns Iran war may push up inflation
summary: The Bank of Japan kept its rates steady at 0.75% as expected, but noted that inflation risks now are tilted to the upside due to the Iran war.

raw.headline: Bank of Japan keeps rates steady as expected, warns Iran war may push up inflation

headline: State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT) Announces Date for Release of First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Conference Call Webcast
summary: BOSTON, March 18, 2026--State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT) plans to announce its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Friday, April 17, 2026 at approximately 7:30 a.m. ET. A conference call to review the firm’s financial results will be held at 11:00 a.m. ET.

headline: Small-Cap Exposure at Lower Cost or Greater Liquidity? SPSM vs. IJR
summary: The SPDR Portfolio S&P 600 Small Cap ETF (SPSM) and the iShares Core S&P Small-Cap ETF (IJR) both follow the same group of small-cap stocks. However, small differences in cost and liquidity can affect how efficiently you invest in them. This comparison highlights where those differences matter and when you should pay attention to them.
